title: Fix of dynamic scheduler temp varable location (#6859)
body:
Fix of: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/6859

The issue was caused by the fact that some temporary variables was in a class scope and not in a task scope - which lead to sharing some temporary variables between co-routines which broke some UVM 2020 tests.

Fix is made by moving temporary variables to the task scope.
